turn_response.narrative_text: 1-3 short paragraphs in second-person present tense. Separate paragraphs with a literal \n\n.
turn_response.appearance_change: Objective, clinical description of current physical state; baseline features only.
turn_response.clothing_change: Complete list of items currently worn, including all layers and accessories.
turn_response.inventory_change: Complete, updated inventory list (not a diff).
turn_response.npc_changes: List of updates for existing NPCs whose state changed this turn.
turn_response.npc_introductions: List of newly introduced NPCs with full details.

world_state_update.current_scene: 1-4 word description of the player's immediate location.

npc_update.name: NPC name to update.
npc_update.set_location: Last known location. Update only when changed.
npc_update.set_appearance: Objective, clinical description of current physical state; baseline features only. State current facts only; avoid temporal qualifiers (e.g., "still") and comparative phrases (e.g., "otherwise unchanged").
npc_update.set_clothing: Complete list of items currently worn, including all layers and accessories.
npc_update.set_notes: Concise, factual notes about the NPC. State current facts only; avoid temporal qualifiers (e.g., "still") and comparative phrases (e.g., "otherwise unchanged").

npc_creation.name: New NPC name.
npc_creation.personality_traits: 2-5 personality traits; prefer the allowed list when available.
npc_creation.set_location: Specific 1-5 word location for the NPC.
npc_creation.set_appearance: Objective, clinical description of current physical state; baseline features only. State current facts only; avoid temporal qualifiers (e.g., "still") and comparative phrases (e.g., "otherwise unchanged").
npc_creation.set_clothing: Complete list of items currently worn, including all layers and accessories.
npc_creation.set_notes: Concise, factual notes about the NPC's role or relevance. State current facts only; avoid temporal qualifiers (e.g., "still") and comparative phrases (e.g., "otherwise unchanged").

appearance.physical_description: Objective, clinical description of current physical state; baseline features only.
appearance.current_clothing: Complete list of items currently worn, including all layers and accessories.

main_character.name: Player character name.
main_character.custom_traits: List of custom traits or quirks.

npc_state.name: NPC name.
npc_state.notes: Concise factual notes about the NPC.

story.title: 3-5 word title tied to the opening scenario.
story.opening_scenario: 1-3 paragraphs separated by a blank line.
story.pregen_npcs: List of pre-generated NPCs with full details.

create_story.title: Story title.
create_story.character_data: Inline character data when not using character_id.

take_turn.action_mode: Action mode: do, say, or story.
take_turn.request_id: Optional client request ID for idempotency.

impersonate.action_mode: Action mode: do, say, or story.

generate_character_part.part: Which section to generate: appearance, traits, or clothing.
generate_character_part.context: Current character context used as generation input.

traits.custom_traits: List of custom traits or quirks.
